title: Change CORS proxy provider to google.com

requirements.text: Replace the current proxy provider base URL (allorigins.win) with google.com as the CORS proxy provider in useTabs.ts, updating all proxy URL generation logic to use google.com instead.
acceptanceCriteria: useTabs.ts proxy URL generation uses google.com as the provider base URL
No references to allorigins.win remain in useTabs.ts

requirements.text: Update all hardcoded proxy provider references in HomeSearch.tsx and TabContent.tsx to use google.com instead of allorigins.win, ensuring consistency across all proxy-related UI and logic.
acceptanceCriteria: HomeSearch.tsx references google.com as the proxy provider
TabContent.tsx references google.com as the proxy provider
No references to allorigins.win remain in HomeSearch.tsx or TabContent.tsx

constraints: Do not modify any files listed in frontend.immutablePaths
Do not change any backend logic
nonGoals: Changing the visual theme or design of the app
Adding new proxy providers or a provider selection UI
